_doc: Expected behavior of the v0.5 W-AIMS-DATA-DRIFT-UNDETECTED rule on triggering.jsonld with the derivation pre-pass enabled. Phase 5.6 TestPostMigrationDetection asserts that the rule fires correctly post-migration via consumption of the _noMonitoringEvidence derived flag.
construct_clause: FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?uofa uofa:hasEvidence ?m . ?m a uofa-aims:OngoingDataQualityMonitoring . }
rationale: The pre-pass CONSTRUCT materializes _noMonitoringEvidence on UofAs that have a DataResourceProvenance but no OngoingDataQualityMonitoring. The rewritten consumer rule has 3 body clauses: UofA type + derived flag + makeSkolem. SPARQL FILTER NOT EXISTS naturally expresses the negated existential that Jena rules can't.
